_comment: Learning mode config. Copy to any project directory and set enabled:true to activate automatic post-session learning. When disabled, learning can still be triggered manually via the learn-session skill.

prompt_effectiveness._comment_model: Uses Haiku by default (cheap). Requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in environment.

domains._comment: Override enabled per domain slug. Inherits top-level enabled if not set.

workflows._comment: Override enabled per workflow name (from ## Workflow: in CLAUDE.md).
